title: Orchestration layer inside Automations (cache->vision->execute) + live wiring

implement.detail: lib/fingerprint.mjs + cache.mjs + browser-orchestrator.mjs (tier model); lib/browser-client.mjs (drives browser-default observe/execute/navigate); engine makeLiveRunBrowser + visionResolve (backend /api/automations/vision, Router-routed, internal-token guarded); src/app/api/automations/vision route

test.detail: automations-browser-orchestrator (7: fingerprint/cache/tier) + browser-observe browser-client live (navigate/observe/execute against real chromium) + engine browser-fitting-down path. 36 automations+browser tests green; typecheck clean.

codexReview.detail: R1: (F1 critical) browser CORS/auth -> Origin guard (HTTP+WS) + nav-scheme confinement; (F2 med) cache step-id collision -> dup-id rejection; (F3 med) ephemeral temp-profile leak -> cleanup on shutdown. R2: all confirmed, raised IPv6 [::1] loopback gap -> FIXED. No rebuttals.

codexPwTest.detail: Z1 drives a real browser step (cache then replay)
